---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Trastuzumab Emtansine 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Trastuzumab Emtansine</strong> 目前有 <strong>24 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Trastuzumab Emtansine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Early Breast Cancer (EBC) Kadcyla, as a single agent, is indicated for the adjuvant treatment of adult patients with HER2-positive early breast cancer who have residual invasive disease, in the...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（99.8%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（99.8%）</li>
<li>breast tumor luminal A or B（99.8%）</li>
<li>synovium cancer（97.5%）</li>
<li>tenosynovial giant cell tumor（96.7%）</li>
<li>tenosynovial giant cell tumor, localized type（96.2%）</li>
<li>malignant giant cell tumor（96.0%）</li>
<li>human herpesvirus 8-related tumor（95.5%）</li>
<li>ectomesenchymoma（95.5%）</li>
<li>malignant cutaneous granular cell skin tumor（95.5%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of tongue（95.5%）</li>
<li>cervical neuroblastoma（95.5%）</li>
<li>schwannoma of jugular foramen（95.5%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of hypopharynx（95.4%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of buccal mucosa（95.4%）</li>
<li>jugular foramen meningioma（95.4%）</li>
<li>neoplasm of major salivary gland（95.4%）</li>
<li>kidney pelvis sarcomatoid transitional cell carcinoma（95.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
